global.description: The ad features a clean layout with geometric shapes and clear text elements.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to save and claim rewards.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Abstract shapes
elements.description: A combination of geometric shapes including a circle and a square, rendered in a soft blue color.

elements.label: Overlay shapes
elements.description: A larger square shape overlaying the background, also in a soft blue tone.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A small circle shape in a lighter blue, positioned within the larger square.

elements.label: Main message
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Save with confidence' with a smaller tagline below it in a clean font.
elements.text_content: Save with confidence Built for peace of mind

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The word 'SwiftStack' in bold, dark text positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A prominent white button with the text 'Claim reward' at the bottom of the ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, minimalist with soft colors, key elements include brand logo and call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the main message is centered, and the call to action is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Save with confidence, Built for peace of mind, SwiftStack, Claim reward
